buildpack.title: Building Pack Manager
buildpack.tooltip.install: Convert the selected structure and install it into the simukraftbuilding directory
buildpack.tooltip.batch: Install every listed file into the category currently selected in the form
buildpack.tooltip.uninstall: Delete this building's .sk and structure files
buildpack.tooltip.delete: Delete the selected file from the import directory (click twice to confirm)
buildpack.tooltip.export: Bundle installed buildings into a zip pack and open the export directory
buildpack.tooltip.capture: Export the region selected in-world (keys [ ]) as a blueprint (.nbt + .litematic)
buildpack.tooltip.open_folder: Open the directory for the current tab
buildpack.tooltip.overwrite: When checked, a building with the same name is overwritten instead of renamed
buildpack.tooltip.tab.import: Loose .nbt / .litematic / .schem files in the import directory (drag & drop supported)
buildpack.tooltip.tab.packs: Zip packs in the import directory
buildpack.tooltip.tab.installed: Buildings already in the simukraftbuilding directory
buildpack.tooltip.form.category: Which SimuKraft category directory the building installs into (decides its in-game role)
buildpack.tooltip.form.name: Display name; also used as the installed file name
buildpack.tooltip.form.amount: Construction price; SimuKraft built-ins use e.g. "8.64元"
buildpack.tooltip.form.author: Author credit
buildpack.tooltip.form.description: Short description (line breaks collapse to spaces in .sk)
buildpack.tooltip.form.job_type: Job id this building provides, e.g. breadShopOwner (empty = none)

buildpack.info.author: Author: %s

buildpack.editor.remove_hint: Click a block type to remove all of it

buildpack.editor.legend:
#Edit
1/2/3/4=Place / Break / Pick / Replace
[ ]=Brush size
Ctrl+drag=Paint stroke
M=Symmetry axis
Del=Delete selection
Ctrl+C/X/V=Copy / Cut / Paste
#Transform & file
R / Shift+R=Rotate 90°
Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y=Undo / Redo
Ctrl+S=Save
#View
\=Cycle slice plane
F=Fit / focus selection
Numpad 1-8=Preset views
G=Gizmo + grid
P=Perspective
H=Toggle this list
buildpack.detail.empty: Select a file to view details
buildpack.status.remote_warning: Connected to a remote server: files are installed locally only; a dedicated server needs server-side installation
buildpack.msg.migrated: Migrated %s legacy loose building(s) into sce_local.zip (originals moved to simukraftbuilding/legacy_backup/)
buildpack.msg.migrate_failed: Failed to migrate legacy loose building files; see the log
buildpack.log.migrated: Migrated %s legacy loose building(s) into the managed local zip
buildpack.msg.newer_version: Structure is from a newer game version (DataVersion %1$s > %2$s); cannot downgrade, construction may misbehave
buildpack.msg.missing_blocks: %1$s block types are missing (will become air): %2$s
buildpack.msg.large_structure: Large structure (%s); construction may take a long time
buildpack.msg.delete_confirm: Click "Delete File" again to confirm deleting %s
buildpack.msg.checksum_mismatch: Checksum mismatch (file may be corrupted or tampered): %s

buildpack.error.entry_too_large: Pack entry too large, refusing to read (possible zip bomb): %s
buildpack.error.pack_empty: Pack contains no buildings (no structure files under buildings/<category>/)
buildpack.select.need_corners: Set both corners first (default keys [ and ])
buildpack.select.hud_one: 1 corner set — set the other corner

buildpack.select.busy: A capture is already in progress

buildpack.definition.title: Commerce/Industry Definition: %s
buildpack.definition.hint: Write the SimuKraft commercial/industrial JSON definition here, or start from a template below
buildpack.definition.readonly: Read-only: this package is not managed
buildpack.definition.msg.empty: Nothing to save; use Delete to remove the definition
buildpack.definition.msg.confirm_templat: This replaces the current text; click again to confirm
buildpack.definition.msg.confirm_discard: Unsaved changes; close again to discard them
buildpack.definition.issue.not_object: The root must be a JSON object
buildpack.definition.issue.unknown_kind: Cannot detect the kind: commercial needs offers, industrial needs recipes
buildpack.definition.issue.both_kinds: Both offers and recipes are present; consider splitting them
buildpack.definition.issue.no_offers: offers is empty: at least one offer is required
buildpack.definition.issue.offer_invalid: Offer #%s is not a JSON object
buildpack.definition.issue.visible_to: Offer %s: visibleTo should be player / npc / mixed
buildpack.definition.issue.offer_cost: Offer %s: cost must not be empty
buildpack.definition.issue.offer_result: Offer %s: result must not be empty
buildpack.definition.issue.resource_inva: Offer %s: %s entry #%s is invalid (needs money > 0 or item)
buildpack.definition.issue.resource_limi: Offer %s: %s has more than 4 entries; extras are ignored
buildpack.definition.issue.no_stock: Item %s appears in result but has no stock rule (players can buy it without limit)
buildpack.definition.issue.no_containers: Missing containers (most steps need input/output containers)
buildpack.definition.issue.no_recipes: recipes is empty: at least one recipe is required
buildpack.definition.issue.recipe_invali: Recipe #%s is not a JSON object
buildpack.definition.issue.recipe_no_io: Recipe %s: provide both inputs and outputs
buildpack.definition.issue.input_empty: Recipe %s: input #%s is missing item / tag / itemStack
buildpack.definition.issue.output_not_co: Recipe %s: output #%s needs a concrete item or itemStack (a tag alone cannot materialize)
buildpack.definition.issue.recipe_steps: Recipe %s: steps must not be empty
buildpack.definition.issue.step_invalid: Recipe %s: step #%s is not a JSON object
buildpack.definition.issue.step_bad_poin: Recipe %s: a step references undefined point %s
buildpack.definition.issue.step_bad_cont: Recipe %s: a step references undefined container %s
buildpack.definition.issue.pos_bounds: %s: coordinate [%s] is outside the structure bounds %s
buildpack.log.definition_read_failed: Failed to read the commerce/industry definition: %s
buildpack.log.definition_write_failed: Failed to write the commerce/industry definition: %s
buildpack.tooltip.capture_no_world: Capturing needs a loaded world: join a save and select two corners with the keybinds first
buildpack.definition.msg.cannot_visual: JSON has syntax errors; fix them before opening the visual editor
buildpack.definition.msg.unknown_kind_vi: Cannot detect the kind (needs offers or recipes); fix it in JSON mode first
buildpack.definition.visual.empty: This building has no definition yet - pick a type to create one:
buildpack.definition.visual.select_hint: Select an entry on the left
buildpack.definition.visual.raw_hint: This entry is not a JSON object; edit it in JSON mode
buildpack.definition.visual.advanced_hin: Edit advanced fields in JSON mode
buildpack.definition.field.name: Name
buildpack.definition.field.id.tip: Definition id; keep it identical to the building file name
buildpack.definition.field.job_id.tip: Job key stored in citizen data; lowercase_underscore names (baker, miller)
buildpack.definition.field.held_item.tip: Default held item id, e.g. minecraft:bread
buildpack.definition.field.work_time.tip: Open hours (day ticks 0-24000): 1000≈sunrise, 13000≈sunset; equal values = always open
buildpack.definition.field.visible_to.ti: player = players only; npc = NPC self-trading only; mixed = both
buildpack.definition.field.cost.tip: Trade cost: money (>0) or item+count; money in cost means the shop charges the player
buildpack.definition.field.result.tip: Trade result: items = selling/bartering; money = buying from the player
buildpack.definition.field.stock.tip: Stock item and cap; every sold/bartered result item needs a stock rule or players can buy it without limit
buildpack.definition.field.initial.tip: Initial stock when the commercial box is first created
buildpack.definition.field.restock_inter: Restock interval (server ticks, 12000≈10 min); ignored once materials are configured
buildpack.definition.field.positions.tip: Structure-local coordinates x,y,z; separate multiple with semicolons: 2,1,4; 3,1,4. Rotated automatically on placement
buildpack.definition.field.select_mode.t: nearest = pick the closest usable point; ordered = always the first entry
buildpack.definition.field.item.tip: Item id, e.g. minecraft:bread; unregistered ids are flagged by Validate
buildpack.definition.field.tag.tip: Item tag (e.g. minecraft:saplings), alternative to Item; tags only match existing items
buildpack.definition.field.consume.tip: Whether the input is consumed; No = only checked for presence (tools)
buildpack.definition.field.base_amount.t: Base yield (worker level adds a bonus unless No multiplier is set)
Extra random yield: adds 0 to N-1
buildpack.definition.field.ignore_multip: Ignore the worker-level yield bonus (fixed amounts, e.g. returned buckets)
buildpack.definition.field.type.tip: Step type; pick frequent ones via Common…, full list in the industrial docs; steps loop in order
buildpack.definition.field.point.tip: References a name defined under Points (e.g. stand, machine)
buildpack.definition.field.container.tip: References a name defined under Containers (usually input / output)
buildpack.definition.field.swing.tip: Play the arm-swing animation while acting
buildpack.definition.template.commercial: Insert the commercial starter template (sell + buy offers; replacing text needs a second click)
buildpack.definition.template.industrial: Insert the industrial starter template (points/containers/sample recipe; replacing text needs a second click)
buildpack.definition.validate.tip: Checks empty offers, unregistered ids, out-of-bounds coordinates, dangling point/container references
buildpack.definition.save.tip: Writes into the building package and reloads SimuKraft immediately, no restart (Ctrl+S)
buildpack.definition.delete.tip: Removes the definition file from the package (second click confirms)
buildpack.guide.title: Pack Making Guide
buildpack.guide.s1.title: 1. Prepare structures
buildpack.guide.s1.body: Drag .litematic / .schem / .nbt files straight into this window (or drop them into simcity_expansion/import/). You can also select two corners in a world with the keybinds and use Capture, or open the editor to rotate, mirror, fill regions and paint blocks.
buildpack.guide.s2.title: 2. Install into SimuKraft
buildpack.guide.s2.body: On the Import tab select a structure, fill in the category (residential/commercial/industry/public/other), name, price and author on the right, then click Install. The building is written into the managed sce_local.zip and appears in SimuKraft's build list immediately.
buildpack.guide.s3.title: 3. Write the commerce/industry definition
buildpack.guide.s3.body: On the Installed tab select the building and open "Commerce/industry definition…" (info-panel button or right-click). Commercial = offers (cost → result + stock rules); industrial = points/containers/recipes/steps. The visual editor is the default; switch to JSON for advanced fields. Coordinates are structure-local and rotate with the building on placement (see the compass in the preview).
buildpack.guide.s4.title: 4. Validate and test
buildpack.guide.s4.body: Click Validate to catch empty offers, unregistered item ids, out-of-bounds coordinates and dangling references (only JSON syntax errors block saving). Then join a world, place the matching commercial/industrial control box and hire an NPC to test the flow.
buildpack.guide.s5.title: 5. Export the pack
buildpack.guide.s5.body: On the Installed tab check the buildings to bundle (or filter with search) and click Export. Fill in the pack name, id, version, author and icon to produce a zip; structures, .sk metadata and definition JSONs are all included.
buildpack.definition.visual.work_area_of: No work area configured (needed for lumberjack/harvest buildings working outside)
buildpack.definition.visual.spawn_off: No first-run entity spawning configured (animal farms)
buildpack.definition.visual.repeat_hint: Edit the loop body steps in the tree on the left
buildpack.definition.field.materials.tip: Material-supplied stock: selling consumes raw materials from containers near the box. Format: item*count; item*count (e.g. minecraft:wheat*3). Disables the restock parameters
buildpack.definition.field.input.tip: References a container name; blank defaults to input
buildpack.definition.field.output.tip: References a container name; blank defaults to output
buildpack.definition.field.output_policy: extract_to_output = move products to the output box; keep_in_machine = leave them in the machine
buildpack.definition.field.poll_ticks.ti: Interval between machine output checks (ticks), default 20
buildpack.definition.field.timeout_ticks: Skip/abort after waiting this many ticks; 0 = never (real machines default 12000)
Target amount to fill up to, default 64
buildpack.definition.field.threshold.tip: Skip the step while the amount is above this; 0 = only refill when empty
buildpack.definition.field.entity.tip: Entity type id, e.g. minecraft:cow; blank matches any animal
Consume the animals' vanilla food from the input container before breeding
buildpack.definition.field.radius.tip: Search/expansion radius: work area = outward blocks; steps = search radius around the point (default 6)
buildpack.definition.field.max_carry.tip: Max carried stacks before depositing, default 18
buildpack.definition.field.target_tag.ti: Block tag of the harvested cluster, e.g. minecraft:logs
Blocks that must connect to the cluster, e.g. minecraft:leaves (identifies natural trees)
buildpack.definition.field.support_tag.t: Support blocks under the base, e.g. minecraft:dirt
buildpack.definition.field.plant_tag.tip: Item tag replanted after harvesting, e.g. minecraft:saplings
Minimum attached blocks; 4 recommended for lumber to avoid cutting player builds
buildpack.definition.field.max_cluster.t: Max blocks handled per connected cluster, default 96
buildpack.definition.field.until_empty.t: Treat clearing the work area as the round's goal; lumberjack huts set this
buildpack.definition.field.fluid.tip: Fluid id, e.g. minecraft:water or minecraft:lava
buildpack.definition.field.replace.tip: Allow replacing non-air blocks; otherwise the step waits while blocked
buildpack.definition.field.drop_items.ti: Generate vanilla drops on destruction; off by default to prevent item farming
buildpack.definition.field.status_key.ti: Optional: use an existing language key as the status text
buildpack.definition.field.status_text.t: Text appended to the status display
Scan starting ring offset; 1 recommended for outside work
buildpack.definition.field.min_y.tip: Lowest Y of the area (offset from the building's lowest point, default -8)
buildpack.definition.field.max_y.tip: Highest Y of the area (offset from the building's highest point, default 24)
Max XZ columns scanned per tick, caps large-area cost, default 64
buildpack.definition.field.exclude_build: Never harvest inside the building's own bounds
buildpack.definition.visual.pick.tip: Click blocks in the 3D preview to add/remove coordinates (slice peeling reaches interiors)
buildpack.definition.msg.no_structure: This building has no usable structure file; 3D picking unavailable
buildpack.picker.title: 3D Coordinate Picker
buildpack.picker.hint: Click blocks to toggle · drag to rotate · right-drag to pan · wheel zooms
buildpack.picker.too_large: Structure too large (voxel preview); go back and type coordinates manually
buildpack.guide.s6.title: 6. Distribute and install
buildpack.guide.s6.body: Share the zip: others drag it into this window to install it (as its own sce_pack_<id>.zip), or select it and use Activate to serve it to SimuKraft without installing. The whole workflow works without entering a save: title screen → Mods → SimCity Expansion → Config (only Capture needs a loaded world).
